emails.subject: Re: Wellhead Volumes
emails.body: Re: Wellhead Volumes Bob, I highlghted some changes on your spreadsheet. Look over these and call me if you have questions. A couple of the deals have Gas Daily tiers, so I moved them down in the sheet. I would like for you to make the changes tomorrow after trading. D Enron North America Corp. From: Robert Cotten 04/05/2001 11:20 AM
